title: SNR RF Optimization Engineer
description:
We are appointing an RF Optimization Engineer (15+ years’ experience) to lead radio network performance improvement activities in Singapore. This role is responsible for planning and executing benchmarking (drive testing and analysis), performing cluster-level RF/RAN optimization, and delivering validated recommendations to improve key network KPIs (Accessibility, Retainability, Mobility, Coverage/Quality, and Throughput) in 4G LTE and 5G NR networks.

Key Responsibilities

1) Project Planning & Delivery Management

  • Establish project workplan, milestones, reporting cadence, and deliverable structure aligned to customer requirements.
  • Coordinate field execution readiness (resources, tooling, drive routes, scheduling, permissions, and safety/compliance).
  • Maintain issue/risk tracking, prioritization, and escalation to ensure timely delivery and stable execution.

2) Network Benchmarking (Drive Test Planning & Execution)

  • Define benchmarking methodology including test objectives, KPIs, test scripts, UE configuration, logging settings, and route selection to ensure repeatable measurements.
  • Lead and oversee drive test execution for benchmarking and cluster validation (outdoor/indoor where applicable).
  • Ensure data integrity through log checks, calibration, synchronization, and quality assurance of collected measurements.
  • Produce benchmark summaries highlighting performance gaps, root causes, and prioritized improvement opportunities.

3) RF/RAN Performance Analysis & Troubleshooting

  • Analyze drive-test logs and performance counters to identify RF coverage/quality issues and mobility/throughput bottlenecks.
  • Perform detailed root-cause analysis for issues such as drops, setup failures, handover failures, reselection problems, interference symptoms, and low throughput areas using L3 signaling and KPI correlation.
  • Identify high-impact cells/clusters, quantify impact, and recommend corrective actions.

4) Cluster-Level Optimization & Validation

  • Establish baseline performance and define optimization targets within the cluster scope.
  • Propose RF/RAN parameter tuning and feature optimization actions to improve KPI performance (e.g., mobility thresholds, reselection/handover criteria, load distribution, coverage-quality trade-offs, CA/MIMO utilization, and capacity-related tuning).
  • Validate changes through post-optimization drive tests and KPI tracking to confirm improvements and stability.
  • Document outcomes with evidence-based reporting and recommendations for further improvement.

5) KPI Tracking, Reporting & Customer Communication

  • Collect and analyze network KPIs and trends (daily/weekly), correlate OSS data with field measurements, and highlight regressions or improvement opportunities.
  • Prepare customer-ready deliverables including interim reports, final reports, KPI dashboards/summaries, and validation evidence (pre/post comparison).
  • Lead technical discussions and review sessions with stakeholders, translating technical findings into clear actions and expected impact.

Tools & Technologies (Typical)

  • Drive test and post-processing tools (e.g., Accuver / TEMS / XCAL / Actix or equivalent)
  • OSS/PM KPI extraction and analysis tools (Excel/Power BI or equivalent reporting)
  • LTE/NR protocol and L3 analysis for mobility and session performance (RRC/NAS interpretation)
  • RF and performance domains: RSRP/RSRQ/SINR/CQI, mobility events, throughput KPIs, capacity indicators, and parameter/feature tuning concepts

Required Qualifications

  • 10+ years of experience in RF/RAN optimization, benchmarking, and performance engineering for LTE and 5G NR networks.
  • Strong capability in drive test design/execution and post-processing/log analysis.
  • Demonstrated expertise in KPI-based troubleshooting and root-cause analysis across accessibility, retainability, mobility, coverage/quality, and throughput.
  • Proven ability to produce customer-facing technical reports and lead optimization review discussions with cross-functional teams.

postedCompany.description:
At KCCTech, we’re dedicated to providing innovative engineering services and advanced technical expertise that help improve the performance and efficiency of existing networks, while also expanding for new technologies and growth.

Our leadership team has a wealth of global experience in the ICT (Information Communication Technology) industry, and we use our expertise and innovative solutions to help our customers solve their unique problems. We have a unique approach to PIM/RTWP challenges on carrier networks, which helps to improve network quality, minimize operational costs, and enhance the customer experience. We also play a key role in supporting the First Responder Network rollout and public safety on a national level.
postedCompany.name: KCCTECH PTE. LTD.
